phonetic: 忙s藞f瑟ksi蓹; 蓹s藞f瑟ksi蓹
examples: Chest with asphyxia, the surface is silent.
Preterm birth, birth asphyxia and infections cause most newborn deaths.
Look inside the lips for any trace of blueness which might indicate asphyxia.
All four died of asphyxia due to trauma following the accident on 21 January 2011.
He told the court she died of asphyxia due to compression of the neck.
